creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
A first try at replicating this here failed. The "show more books" button works as expected.

My suspect is that you either have an old version of `www/py-html5-parser` port installed or for some reason your package is missing a file.

While investigating I found another issue due to a missing dependency in net/py-zeroconf which I'm going to report in its own ticket.
